name: Grounded Surface Cleaner- Everyday 500ml
description: Our soap-based spray is ready to tackle serious messes. Powered by Castile soap and boosted with germ fighting essential oils for fresh countertops. It is a deep cleaning spray that kills germs, cleans stains and neutralizes the toughest of odors. Use it for cleaning of carpets, kennels, utensils and surfaces. Formerly Spray-Deep, now Surface Cleaner Extra Strength. Instructions: Shake gently. Spray onto surface & wipe with damp cloth. A little goes a long way! Ingredients: Saponified Coconut, Canola, Sunflower Oils; Citric Acid, Sodium Bicarbonate, Lemongrass, Eucalyptus & Tea Tree Essential Oils Proudly MADE IN KENYA by Grounded
